response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse experience across architectures and languages, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT consulting, UML expertise, and formal project management — plus his German is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public tools
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Node.js, DLang, and cloud infra
Extensive experience mentoring and creating technical workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not C1 as required
No explicit evidence of UML, requirements management, or IT security compliance experience
Lacks documented experience in client-facing IT consulting or architectural advisory roles
